decisions.title: Background Work Needs Explicit Handles
decisions.description: Long-running tasks are only usable if the foreground agent can refer to them later by id, poll them, and surface notifications when they finish.
decisions.alternatives: Fire-and-forget threads are easy to start, but they give the agent no safe way to reason about unfinished work.

zh.title: 后台任务必须有可引用的句柄
zh.description: 长任务只有在前台 agent 能按 id 查询、轮询并接收完成通知时才真正可用。

ja.title: バックグラウンド作業には参照ハンドルが必要
ja.description: 長時間実行タスクは、前景エージェントが id で参照し、状態確認し、完了通知を受け取れるときに初めて実用的になります。

decisions.title: Completion Signals Must Re-Enter The Main Loop
decisions.description: The harness appends notifications back into the active conversation so background progress can influence the next foreground decision.
decisions.alternatives: Keeping background results in a side table is possible, but the model will not naturally react unless the harness reintroduces them.

zh.title: 后台完成信号要重新回到主循环
zh.description: 后台进度必须重新注入当前对话，这样前台模型的下一步决策才能真正利用这些结果。

ja.title: 完了通知はメインループへ戻す
ja.description: バックグラウンド結果は会話に再注入されてこそ、次の前景判断に影響を与えられます。
